HATMAGICIAN2-HAT_MAGICIAN2.cardsModifier: __ cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
HATMAGICIAN2-HAT_MAGICIAN2.description:
一位在绘法师学院中不被主流所理解的抽象派绘师。
使用巨大画笔描绘独特的烙印魔法，她极致的施法速度以及不被理解的抽象画作被大众视为禁忌。
HATMAGICIAN2-HAT_MAGICIAN2.goldMonologue: Line spoken when obtaining a large amount of gold
HATMAGICIAN2-HAT_MAGICIAN2.title: 绘印魔女
